description: Recurring issue: commands.jsonl references persisted despite migration to recipes.jsonl, causing AI confusion
workaround: Comprehensive expungement across all layers: critical files, recipes, scripts, docs, bootstrap artifacts
context: Incomplete original migration left deep references in personas, scripts, bootstrap templates. Systematic replacement executed 2025-10-28. Critical files (N5.md, prefs.md, personas) now clean. Remaining refs only in Archives/Inbox/Temporary (acceptable).

description: Squawk log initialized - Core + Specialist architecture v2.0 deployed
Debug logging system deployed - tracks problem→hypothesis→outcome cycles in build/debug conversations with circular pattern detection
context: Auto-creates DEBUG_LOG.jsonl for build/debug types. Pattern detection: 70% text similarity OR 60% keyword overlap, alerts at 3+ similar problems in 10 entry window. Tested successfully with import error scenario. Integrated with session_state_manager, documented in recipes + operational docs.
